description: This file defines a Bootstrap Toast component class, including its properties, methods, event handling, and integration with jQuery. It manages the display and hiding of toast notifications with animation and interaction handling.

classes.name: Toast
classes.description: A class representing the Bootstrap toast component, handling show/hide logic, event interactions, and lifecycle management.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the toast notification, triggers show events, manages CSS classes for animation, and schedules auto-hide if enabled.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the toast notification, triggers hide events, and manages CSS classes for animation.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up the toast instance, clears timers, and removes classes.

methods.name: isShown
methods.description: Returns true if the toast is currently visible.

methods.name: _maybeScheduleHide
methods.description: Schedules the toast to hide after a delay if autohide is enabled and no user interaction is detected.

methods.name: _onInteraction
methods.description: Handles user interactions such as mouseover, mouseout, focusin, and focusout to control auto-hide behavior.

methods.name: _setListeners
methods.description: Sets up event listeners for user interactions on the toast element.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery-style invocation of toast methods.
